title: Make it! Shaved Ice
description:
Let's make shaved ice on the Steam!

Quickly shave ice and add the correct toppings to fill each order!

Aim for a new high score!

[Score Attack]

Make lots of shaved ice and climb the leaderboards!

[Battle]

Compete in battles and put your shaved ice skills to the test!

《Rules》Make shaved ice and fill customer orders!

Make as many as you can within the time limit!

《How to Play》1. Shave the ice!

2. Add the syrup that matches the order!

3. Add fruit as a topping!

4. Serve the shaved ice to your customers! Match the orders exactly to earn more points!
description_short: Get ready for a delicious shaved ice challenge! Make lots of shaved ice and watch your food cart prosper!
